creator: freebsd-bug@kirpa.com
text:
System crash during destroy or lost (in case hdd problem) mounted ciss volume. If volume is not mounted during destroy - problem is not exists.

Fix: 

Do not destroy mounted volume(s) and replace bad drive ASAP for avoid losting volume.
How-To-Repeat: 1. using 'hpacucli' create volume.
2. make file system and mount it.
3. destroy volume
